import{createContext,useEffect,useState,useContext}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export default function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUser]=useState(null);const[users,setUsers]=useState(()=>{const storedUsers=localStorage.getItem('users');return storedUsers?JSON.parse(storedUsers):[{mobile:'1234567890'}];});const[otpStore,setOtpStore]=useState({});// Temporary store for OTPs
useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem('users',JSON.stringify(users));},[users]);const sendOTP=mobile=>{// Mock OTP generation
const otp=Math.floor(100000+Math.random()*900000).toString();setOtpStore(prev=>({...prev,[mobile]:otp}));console.log(`OTP for ${mobile}: ${otp}`);// In real app, send via SMS
return true;};const verifyOTP=(mobile,otp)=>{return otpStore[mobile]===otp;};const logIn=(mobile,otp)=>{if(verifyOTP(mobile,otp)){const found=users.find(u=>u.mobile===mobile);if(found){setUser({mobile});setOtpStore(prev=>{const newStore={...prev};delete newStore[mobile];return newStore;});return true;}}return false;};const signUp=(mobile,otp)=>{if(verifyOTP(mobile,otp)){const exists=users.some(u=>u.mobile===mobile);if(exists)return{success:false,message:'Mobile number already registered'};const newUser={mobile};setUsers(prev=>[...prev,newUser]);setUser({mobile});setOtpStore(prev=>{const newStore={...prev};delete newStore[mobile];return newStore;});return{success:true};}return{success:false,message:'Invalid OTP'};};const logOut=()=>setUser(null);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{user,logIn,signUp,logOut,sendOTP},children:children});}export const useAuth=()=>useContext(AuthContext);
